title: Neon Panties Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Neon Panties Evangelion             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 14, 2007 1:12 pm The purpose of this thread is to compile all known instances of fanservice that includes panties and bras throughout the show. List all the times you can remember seeing either, if you can post a screenie then all the better! This is, of course, necessary for us to understand the subtle complexities of NGE. The first shot of underwear I remember is in episode 2: When Ritsuko does her scan thingy of Rei: Just before the fight with Ramiel we can see Rei's delicious mauve and white panties: In episode 5, note that in the first shot of the top drawer we can see Rei has some coffee coloured numbers (see this post for possible theory regarding the disappearing coffee coloured panties): In the Jet Alone episode, I suppose these count as they are still undergarments: At the beginning of episode 12: Help the cause!

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Dec 14, 2007 1:48 pm Do panty shots count as fanservice? oh yeah, Japan has a thing about panties...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Dec 14, 2007 4:29 pm You're my hero, zuggy.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Dec 14, 2007 8:08 pm in ep 9, as Asuka and Shinji are preparing for the fight against Israfel, during that montage of theirs, theyre listening to music while their underwear is drying in the wind.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sat Dec 15, 2007 9:33 pm Is this another intentinal over analysis thread? I see a short and funny ride ahead...

[]:             Quote Post by Shawn Dudley » Sat Dec 15, 2007 9:41 pm Is this another intentinal over analysis thread? I see a short and funny ride ahead...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Dec 16, 2007 6:01 am Kyle wrote: Is this another intentinal over analysis thread?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 6:55 am Thanks for linking to my Underpants Gnomes theory, Zuggy. It made me "lol". You know, this is actually kind of hard. (Then, I don't normally pay attention to such things.) I would have to scavenge the series for more girlie undergarments. Though, offhand, you can sorta see Misato's undies when she's walking through the corridor with the phone pressed to her ear, near the beginning of 25'.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Dec 16, 2007 12:21 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: in ep 9, as Asuka and Shinji are preparing for the fight against Israfel, during that montage of theirs, theyre listening to music while their underwear is drying in the wind.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Dec 16, 2007 12:45 pm You missed the hemline line shot after the wind gust in episode 08.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 16, 2007 1:06 pm Also (although the full image wasn't shown and I could only obtain the cropped version): and as an animated gif: (Thankyou, THAT BOARD. <3)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2007 2:21 pm I originally saw the Asuka animation accompanying someone's Yahoo Japan auctions, for my part.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 16, 2007 2:27 pm Really? hehe nice. I think I first saw it on that evangelion.tv website. perhaps you've heard of it?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 16, 2007 3:41 pm You briefly see a bra in episode nine on top of Asuka's boxes when she's first moving in.

[]:             Quote Post by rain1776 » Sun Dec 16, 2007 10:42 pm And this is why people love this show so much

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 16, 2007 11:20 pm rain1776 wrote: And this is why people love this show so much

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Dec 17, 2007 12:37 am NAveryW wrote: You registered to say that ? <=P

[]:             Quote Post by rain1776 » Mon Dec 17, 2007 9:21 am NAveryW wrote: rain1776 wrote: And this is why people love this show so much

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Dec 17, 2007 10:10 am NAveryW wrote: You briefly see a bra in episode nine on top of Asuka's boxes when she's first moving in.

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Mon Dec 17, 2007 1:28 pm rain1776 wrote: Nope. Thats just my first post.
